Methodology page shipped in feature/points PR
Fragments + st.navigation + CSS motion shipped on feature/ui-polish; verified via AppTest smoke across all pages
League-pulse home page (leader tiles, Elo dot plot, net-rating diverging bars, slate), leader-chip empty states on profile/compare; verified with AppTest + real browser screenshots

Monte Carlo simulator shipped: ml/simulate.py (HCA 2.2, sigma 0.096 fitted on train seasons), holdout log loss 0.601 vs model 0.585 recorded in DATA_ROADMAP + methodology page; Simulate tab verified in browser
Net rating + clutch net rating on profile header/percentiles, compare table/percentiles, and home leader tiles/boards; new client endpoints cached; attach_ratings tested; verified in browser

Teams nav page: tiles, margin trend, roster w/ ratings, last-10, East/West standings; verified via AppTest
season_type through ingest (game_log, shot_chart; playoff-only cache keys) + Regular/Playoffs toggle in profile season detail; SGA playoffs verified
Zones vs league view on shot chart: cached league zone averages, pure zone_efficiency (tested), diverging 3-bucket coloring with zone hover
Empirical 80% interval from training residual quantiles stored in artifact; retrained (holdout numbers reproduced exactly); UI range caption; method recorded in roadmap + methodology
Dockerfile (uv, data volume) + docs/DEPLOYMENT.md covering the datacenter-IP block and warmed-cache workflow; image not built here (no docker), flagged in doc

Retrained 2026-07-16: dev-tuned C landed on 0.25, holdout reproduced 70.2%/0.589 exactly; interval coverage measured at 80.4%; metrics.json written and app captions verified via AppTest.
Built and visually verified via Playwright screenshots: duel bar, scoreline, badges, headshot leader cards, progress tables all render; 96 tests green.
Not needed currently — WNBA support descoped by user decision

Shipped via stats.nba.com TeamPlayerOnOffSummary (path 1 in the issue): NBAClient.team_player_on_off + analysis.team_on_off, surfaced as profile tiles and a Teams-page table (100-min floor). PBP-derived custom splits (leverage/two-player WOWY) remain a possible follow-up.

DARKO DPM ingested from darko.app's SvelteKit data endpoint (decode tested offline), joined by nba_id/PLAYER_ID, cached 24h; shown on profile tile, percentiles, compare table, roster. Attribution + license caveat documented in README and Methodology. LEBRON/RAPTOR not included (optional scope).

Empirical league xeFG by zone shipped: analysis.shot_quality, profile tiles under shot chart (per season/season-type), compare-page expander. Deviation: shows diff vs league-average eFG instead of league percentiles — true percentiles need every player's shot chart (one fetch each), not worth the rate-limit cost.

Shipped nba_insights/posters.py: compare duel (1:1 1080px) and game prediction (16:9 1200px) posters, each as self-contained HTML and PIL-drawn PNG; /posters/compare and /posters/game endpoints (format=html|png); in-app PNG download buttons on Compare and Predictions (buttons instead of cross-service links — Streamlit and the API are separate processes). Offline tests for renderers and endpoints; posters visually verified with live data.

Era coverage shipped for the 1996-97+ dashboard era: seasons_since() in config, season param threaded through serve.league_with_ratings (DPM current-only), League pulse season selector (leaders + team form rewind; Elo/slate stay current), profile percentile season picker incl. retired players (verified: 1996-97 Jordan ranks vs his era), warm --seasons for one-time immutable backfill. Pre-1996 seasons deliberately not offered (dashboards return empty upstream).

Blocked by licensing, closed per the issue's own protocol: no compliant free source exists. Spotrac/HoopsHype/Basketball-Reference ToS prohibit scraping; public CSVs (GitHub/data.world/Kaggle) are scrapes of those sources (provenance-tainted); nba_api has no salary endpoints. Clean path is a paid license (e.g. SportsDataIO) — reopen if the project ever budgets for one. Documented in README data & legal.

Scoped v1 shipped: NBAClient.draft_history + draft_combine (past years immutable), analysis/draft.py (draft_class join incl. WINGSPAN_DIFF, player_draft_line), new Draft page (year picker to 1947, combine columns from 2000), draft pedigree on profile header. Verified live: 2014 class, Jokić #41 with NaN combine (skipped it). Statistical comps model and college stats remain out of scope as filed.

Shipped after owner removed the no-scraping policy: ingest/salaries.py scrapes B-Ref's single all-players contracts page (utf-8 forced, two-level header flattened, $ parsed, BRK/PHO/CHO tricodes mapped) through Cache.get_or_fetch on a weekly TTL; analysis/salaries.py joins by accent/suffix-normalized name. Profile header shows salary, Teams roster shows per-player $M + committed payroll. Guardrails honored: one page/week, Streamlit-only — verified the public API/serve layer carries no salary data. 123 tests incl. parse/join/payroll fixtures.

Shipped end-to-end. GameRotation-based (pivot from sub-parsing: V3 subs only carry the outgoing player). pbp/stints.py: pure engine — clock→game-tenths, boundary slicing, margin attribution, possession estimation (FGA−OREB+TOV+0.44FTA, OREB inferred from preceding miss), garbage-time stripping per the parse rule. pbp/lineups.py: cache-only builder with 90% coverage floor; backfill fetches with --delay 3 + failure-rate breaker (upstream tar-pits ~20s/req, serves empties per-request-lottery — converged 2024-25 to 90.4% over 5 passes). 2024-25 table: 15,776 lineups/1,112 games; validated vs LeagueDashLineups: MIN r=0.985, NET r=0.942, median MIN ratio 0.913 (coverage+GT as expected). Lineup tab prefers the stint table with dashboard fallback; 2025-26 has no upstream rotation data yet, so the tab falls back until next season's cron builds it. 133 tests.
Hexbin hot-zones shot chart, animated chart transitions via stable keys, mark/color polish across all charts; 135 tests pass, ruff clean

All 8 feedback items addressed: alignment CSS + placeholders, 2-decimal tables, 190px profile photos, team logos, contract sections on profile+teams, hexbin redrawn as tiled shapes with volume shrinkage, percentile chart fixed, Draft nav commented out. 136 tests pass, ruff clean.

All top-5 + second-tier grill findings fixed and verified via live-app screenshots: hero-tile rate floors (Wembanyama not Caruso) + qualification caption; density-aware form chart with win/loss margin dots; .streamlit theme (blue primary/progress bars, minimal toolbar); plain-language stat labels + percent formatting + per-row consistent decimals; hot-zones court ink on top + strength callout + min_fga=3; percentile dot-strip; dead Next-slate stub removed; sidebar brand + per-page titles; roster full-width; profile tiles two rows; duel bar away=neutral; modebar hidden. 136 tests pass, ruff clean.
Rule-based scouting takes (analysis/insights.py) wired into profile and team pages as accented callouts; 6 unit tests; verified live on SGA profile and OKC team page.

Clickable drill-down verified live: leaderboard row -> profile, roster row -> profile (from a fragment, via _nav_to flag + app rerun + main switch_page), standings row -> team (via _pending_team seed before widget). 142 tests pass, ruff clean.

Team colors (viz.TEAM_COLORS + team_color) applied to team-page scouting callout accent and margin rolling line; new league-landscape ORtg/DRtg quadrant chart on home page with team-colored dots + tricode labels + quadrant identities. Verified live on home + LAL page. Tests added.

Shot-type/range splits delivered: shot_breakdown() + shot_diet-by-range chart (volume share, FG%, PPS, vs-league diverging color) on the profile, with a unit test. Verified live on SGA. Positional-context tiles deferred to a follow-up (needs a position data source).

All 8 UI items done and verified live: profile charts stacked full-width; contract & salary surfaced inline; percentile-data-table removed; Teams icon 🏟️→🏆; leaderboards consolidated into one table; Elo explanation caption; compare table shows career averages (career_averages helper, volume-weighted %); predictions matchup card with team logos + form comparison. 148 tests pass, ruff clean.

6 of 7 items done and verified live: Teams contract book inline; compare season-by-season table (stat-selectable, rows=seasons); compare shot quality inline; profile pills repositioned below scouting take with 'Elite this season' label; leaderboards redone as a clean 6-card grid inline; home full team form inline. Item 4 (career salary progression) deferred — needs a historical salary source we don't scrape. 148 tests pass, ruff clean.

Explore page shipped in PR #21: master sortable/filterable league table (filters, column presets, per-game/per-36 toggle, click-to-profile, CSV). analysis/explore.py (filter_players, per_minutes_table) with 3 unit tests. Verified live. 151 tests pass, ruff clean.
Added ml/season.py (Elo-driven Monte Carlo season+playoff simulator) and a Season outlook page with Regular season and Postseason tabs; tests + methodology + README updated
Implemented detailed responsive NBA Insights website and verified API, lint, and full test suite.
Ported League Pulse, player comparison, and team room features from Streamlit into the responsive PWA with tested API endpoints.
Implemented richer player intelligence, filterable Explore Stats, and Game Center in the PWA with public-safe API endpoints, responsive layouts, and full regression coverage.
Shipped Game Center box-score drill-down with cached data path, offline unit coverage, Streamlit smoke coverage, and documentation.
Player intelligence parity shipped in API and PWA with tests.
Team Room parity shipped in API and PWA with tests.
Advanced prediction and methodology parity shipped with tests.
Implemented server-side structured AI Q&A with credential-safe fallback and selectable final-game team box scores; API tests pass.
Implemented network-first versioned service worker, expanded responsive navigation, README/API documentation, and complete Streamlit-to-PWA parity audit in docs/PWA_PARITY.md; full suite passes.

All visible Streamlit analytics surfaces are now represented in the FastAPI PWA; intentional Draft exclusion and optional/local prerequisites are documented. Full quality gate: 197 tests pass, Ruff/JS/diff checks pass.
Delivered all three requested PWA improvements with automated and real-cache validation.
Fixed real blank box scores and delivered tested 2026-27 East/West playoff, championship, and NBA Cup forecast tables.

Implemented time-safe season backtesting, calibration/Brier/record metrics with baselines, versioned artifact/data cutoffs, machine-readable registry, and visible Methodology lineage. Full suite: 207 passed.

Implemented official 2026 groups, official tiebreak order, wild cards, higher-seed knockouts, group/stage/champion probabilities, source metadata, and schedule-pending UI. Real-cache and API validation pass.
Acceptance met: completed games render cached story sections, unavailable states and method caveat are explicit, mobile layout added, tests pass.
Acceptance met: versioned roster/minutes inputs drive the forecast, record bands and trophy odds are exposed, every adjustment is auditable, validation scope is honestly recorded, and all tests pass.
Acceptance met: roster/age/minutes assumptions, ranges, comparable trajectories, missing-history behavior, holdout metrics, and field-calibrated award totals are exposed and tested.
Acceptance met: two-team shared-sample comparison, ranked probability drivers and limitations, share/export, responsive UI, documentation, and tests are complete.
Acceptance met: validated minutes/availability/roster/trade scenarios recalculate paired before-after outcomes, explain changes, screen available salary data, and never overwrite baseline inputs.

Acceptance met: audited tracking/hustle/defense metrics have definitions and sample filters, player/team views expose freshness and failure states, share filters work, favorites persist locally, notifications are opt-in, and responsive tests pass.
All eight scoped roadmap capabilities are delivered, documented, validated, and labeled by methodology/data availability.
All planned product-elevation directions and their positional-context follow-up are delivered or superseded by shipped work.

Implemented local-only career salary progression: stable B-Ref slug resolution, on-demand per-player history cached 30 days, merged historical/current contract chart, guarded API history, documentation, and offline tests. Full suite: 242 passed; ruff clean.
Rebased PR #31 onto origin/main, resolved the README season-outlook conflict, passed 252 tests plus Ruff/JS/diff checks, force-pushed with lease, and verified GitHub reports MERGEABLE.

Widened the Matchup Lab shell, made forecast grid tracks shrinkable, contained table overflow, stacked conferences at tablet/phone widths, bumped the PWA shell cache, and added regression assertions. Verified with desktop and 390px headless Chrome renders; 252 tests, Ruff, JS, and diff checks pass.

Added a responsive SVG percentile profile comparison for 2-4 players with seven shared skill/impact axes, category-lead and average-percentile legend, accessible labels, qualifying-sample fallback, retained exact tables, and PWA cache update. Full suite: 252 passed; Ruff/JS/diff checks clean.

Made Explore player names accessible interactive links that switch to Player Lab, populate the profile search, and load the selected PLAYER_ID through the existing profile path. Updated PWA cache and regression assertions; 252 tests plus Ruff/JS/diff checks pass.

Added an eight-axis position-peer percentile octagon to Player Lab with scoring, creation, rebounding, defensive, efficiency, and impact axes; readable labels/tooltips, higher-is-better explanation, mobile-contained scrolling, exact percentile bars, and incomplete-data fallback. Full suite: 252 passed; Ruff/JS/diff checks clean.

Removed Player Lab dead space by stacking Recent Form above a responsive 3/2/1-column Similar Players grid; intentionally hid exact position-percentile bars; added a dashed, labeled position-group median at the 50th percentile to the octagon; bumped PWA cache and added regressions. Full suite: 252 passed; Ruff/JS/diff clean.
Made the projection endpoint test deterministic by injecting its holdout metrics artifact; focused test and Ruff pass.
